main_themes: The 'Financial Idol': When the bank account becomes the source of security instead of God.
Integrity in Business: Why shortcuts always result in a spiritual disconnect.
The Discipline of the Mundane: Finding God's will in the 'boring' daily tasks.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: If your peace disappears when the money does, you weren't worshiping God—you were worshiping the bank account.

creator_notes.tone: Direct challenge on financial idolatry. (V3 Reprocessed Output).
